data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for parallel signature routing.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the parallel signature routing (Party A and B simultaneously, then C). However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that the system implements this routing mechanism. The linked use case describes a multi-party sign-off workflow but lacks concrete evidence of the routing being validated, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of parallel signature routing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
